# FluxyChat — documentation bundle for LLMs

URL: https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat

## What FluxyChat is

FluxyChat is a multi-tenant realtime **in-app chat** API on Cloudflare Workers:

- **WebSocket** rooms (`GET /ws/room/:roomId`)
- **One Durable Object per room** (ordering, fan-out, presence)
- **D1** for history, quotas, agents, webhooks
- **Next.js console** (hosted beta) + **MIT self-host**
- **npm** `@fluxy-chat/sdk` — headless transport + React `useChat`

Not a telco SMS/WhatsApp provider. Compare to Pusher, Stream, Ably, or self-hosted Socket.io + your own DB.

## SDK (@fluxy-chat/sdk)

Install: `npm install @fluxy-chat/sdk`

### Mint member JWT (server-side)

```bash
curl -X POST "$WORKER_URL/auth/token" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "X-Fluxy-Api-Key: fc_your_project_key" \
  -d '{"userId":"alice","roles":["member"],"ttlSeconds":3600}'
```

### React useChat

```tsx
const { messages, sendMessage, connectionState, retryMessage, loadMore, hasMore } =
  useChat({ roomId, client });
```

- **Optimistic sends**: messages include `deliveryStatus` (`pending` | `sent` | `failed`) and `clientMessageId`
- **retryMessage(clientMessageId)** after failure
- **connectionState**: `{ status, lastError, retryAttempt, nextRetryAt, transport }` for "Reconnecting in Ns" UI
- **Transport fallback**: WebSocket → SSE → polling (inside hook when reconnect exhausts)

### Framework-agnostic

- `FluxyChatClient` — REST + WS URL
- `FluxyChatRoomConnection` — reconnect with exponential backoff, optional REST history replay on reconnect
- `FluxyMessageStream` — bot/agent outbound streaming helper

## WebSocket event types (inbound/outbound)

`history`, `message`, `edit`, `delete`, `reaction`, `read`, `typing`, `presence`, `agentTyping`, `tool_call`, `tool_result`, `tool_error`, `agentRun`, `error`, `ping`/`pong`

## REST highlights

- `POST /messages` — create message (JWT); optional `clientMessageId`, `templateId`, `templateVars`
- `GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /templates` — message templates (admin JWT)
- `GET /activities` — merged webhook + agent + automation timeline
- `GET /api/messages?roomId=&limit=&before=` — paginated history
- `POST /webhooks/register` — HMAC-signed outbound events
- `POST /agents/:id/invoke` — agent in room (streaming tool events on room WS)

## Webhooks

Signed with `X-Fluxy-Signature: sha256=<hex>`. Event types include `message.created`, `mention`, `dm_message`, `report.created`, `room_summary`.

## Self-host

Monorepo: `apps/worker`, `apps/dashboard`, `packages/sdk`. Deploy Worker with wrangler; D1 migrations; set JWT secret and API keys per project.

## Hosted beta

https://www.fluxychat.com/get-started — Clerk signup provisions project + console.

- docs/cookbook/auth-jwt.md

- SPEC.md — full domain model
